title: Procedure conversation UI polish and evaluation tool-output responsiveness
description:
As a procedures dashboard user, I want conversation headers, session naming, tool call surfaces, and evaluation tool-output cards to render consistently and quickly, so that optimizer runs are readable and actionable in real time.

Feature: Procedure conversation and evaluation rendering polish
Scenario: Header alignment and compactness
Given a procedure conversation view with sidebar and selected session
When the conversation UI renders
Then sidebar and main headers share the same height token and controls are vertically centered

Scenario: New session naming
Given a user creates a new procedure chat session
When the session record is created
Then the stored category/name uses Optimize terminology for new sessions

Scenario: Borderless tool surfaces
Given tool call/response rows are shown
When tool cards render
Then region boundaries use flat background shading and no border/outline classes

Scenario: Progressive evaluation rendering
Given a tool response contains an evaluation id
When evaluation output renders
Then an initial card appears immediately from lightweight evaluation/task data
And heavy score results hydrate in a later phase
And segmented stage progress plus accuracy bar with baseline/current-baseline markers are visible when metadata exists

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Removed the remaining border outlines from the top-level Progress and Next Steps cards in ProcedureTask so they match the flat background treatment used elsewhere in the procedure UI. Verified with dashboard typecheck.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Wrapped the procedure summary block in the same outer bg-card container used by nearby sections so Progress and Next Steps now follow the same bg-card -> bg-background layering pattern. Verified with dashboard typecheck.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Adjusted the Optimizer Metrics section to use the same surface layering as nearby procedure sections: header/toggles on the outer bg-card, chart body on an inset bg-background surface. Verified with dashboard typecheck.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Added Lucide section icons to the ProcedureTask cost and cycle headers: Cost Breakdown now uses CircleDollarSign and Cycles uses Repeat, keeping the same muted section-title treatment as the other procedure panels. Verified with dashboard typecheck.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Investigating Conversations header action alignment. Adjusting fullscreen button spacing so it lines up horizontally with the session-row ellipsis in the procedure conversation viewer.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Adjusted the ProcedureTask Conversations header spacing so the fullscreen button uses the same horizontal inset as the session-header ellipsis in the embedded conversation viewer. Validation: npm -C dashboard run -s typecheck.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Prepared commit for current procedure UI polish and score-config cache normalization work. Pending validation, commit, push, and CI verification.
